title: Ping Check in Chat
description: This is a Simple Plugin that displays the ping of the user next to their username in the chat!
body:
PingCheckChat is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that displays a player's ping beside their name in chat. It’s designed for clarity, performance, and a touch of mythic flair—perfect for admins who want real-time feedback and players who love stylish feedback loops.
When a player sends a message, their ping is shown in brackets before their name, color-coded for readability: 🟢 Good (<100ms), 🟡 Moderate (100–200ms), 🔴 Poor (>200ms).
All thresholds and symbols are configurable via config.yml.
Example: [🟢 42ms] Gamecat999: Just launched the new plugin!
[🔴 312ms] MythicMage: Lagging a bit here...
Built for Paper 1.20.1+ and Java 17+, PingCheckChat is easy to install and featherlight on resources.
Just drop the jar into your plugins folder and restart—no setup required unless you want to customize.
Includes:
- Real-time ping display in chat
- Emoji and color-coded formatting
- Configurable thresholds and symbols
- Clean, modular codebase with Maven support
